untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires multi-bar peak identification (shape comparison, valley depth measurement 10-25%, top-to-top variation 0-3%, time separation 2-6 weeks). These require historical pattern recognition logic not expressible with single-bar indicators and basic operators. The signal requires explicit peak/valley detection across multiple bars with geometric shape analysis, which is beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Provided partial SHORT entry conditions based on breakout confirmation (close below prior high) and volume preference (higher on right top). Exit uses reversal condition (close above prior high). Stop loss set at 2% above right top high as specified. True implementation requires custom pattern detection function for double top identification.
